creator: freebsd@nagilum.org
text:
When building devel/dconf I get this error:
  CCLD   dconf
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/var/tmp/export/ports/devel/dconf/work/dconf-0.14.1/bin'
Making all in docs
gmake[2]: Entering directory `/var/tmp/export/ports/devel/dconf/work/dconf-0.14.1/docs'
  GEN    dconf-service.1
I/O error : Attempt to load network entity http://docbook.sourceforge.net/release/xsl/current/manpages/docbook.xsl
warning: failed to load external entity "http://docbook.sourceforge.net/release/xsl/current/manpages/docbook.xsl"
cannot parse http://docbook.sourceforge.net/release/xsl/current/manpages/docbook.xsl
gmake[2]: *** [dconf-service.1] Error 4
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/var/tmp/export/ports/devel/dconf/work/dconf-0.14.1/docs'
gmake[1]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/var/tmp/export/ports/devel/dconf/work/dconf-0.14.1'
gmake: *** [all] Error 2
*** [do-build] Error code 1

Stop in /export/ports/devel/dconf.

===>>> make failed for devel/dconf
===>>> Aborting update

===>>> Update for devel/dconf failed
===>>> Aborting update

===>>> Killing background jobs
Terminated

	I don't know what is used to attempt to fetch the xsl but it
	should work fine:
root@cakebox /usr/ports/devel/dconf > curl http://docbook.sourceforge.net/release/xsl/current/manpages/docbook.xsl|wc -c
  % Total    % Received % Xferd  Average Speed   Time    Time     Time  Current
                                 Dload  Upload   Total   Spent    Left  Speed
100 15230  100 15230    0     0  27987      0 --:--:-- --:--:-- --:--:-- 28047
   15230

	Since this could be docbook related:
root@cakebox /usr/ports/devel/dconf > pkg info|grep docbook
docbook-1.5                    Meta-port for the different versions of the DocBook DTD
docbook-sgml-4.5_1             DocBook SGML DTD
docbook-xml-5.0_1              DocBook XML DTD
docbook-xsl-1.76.1_2           XSL DocBook stylesheets
sdocbook-xml-1.1_1,2           "Simplified" DocBook XML DTD

Fix: 

Unknown
How-To-Repeat: 	build devel/dconf
